cases.prompt: Mobile home parcels in Mount Vernon, including mobile home parks and mobile homes on owned or leased land.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT
  ps.parcel_number,
  ps.owner_name,
  ps.situs_address,
  ps.situs_city_state_zip,
  ps.land_use,
  ps.acres,
  ps.assessed_value,
  ps.assessor_building_value,
  ps.primary_actual_year_built,
  ps.primary_building_improvement_value
FROM
  read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
WHERE
  (lower(ps.city_name) = 'mount vernon' OR lower(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%mount vernon%')
  AND (
    regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1) IN ('150', '180', '181')
  )
cases.title: Mobile Home Parcels in Mount Vernon Including Parks and Owned/Leased Land
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels in Mount Vernon city with land use codes for mobile homes, mobile home parks, or leased mobile home land. Includes parcels with land_use codes 180 (Mobile homes), 181 (MH leased property), and 150 (Mobile home parks). Filters by city_name or situs_city_state_zip containing 'mount vernon'.

generation_attempts.error: Column building_value is not listed for alias ps on derived/parcel_search.parquet. Do not select generic building_value or year_built from parcel_search. Use assessor_building_value, primary_building_improvement_value, total_improvement_value, primary_actual_year_built, oldest_actual_year_built, or primary_effective_year_built when those fields are needed.
